Why `gh sr` cannot setup the `RUNNER_TEMP` for users instead of warninig?

  rune-agentic:   - RUNNER_TEMP is not set; gh-aw requires it to be set to a path other than /tmp

╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  Agentic Prerequisite Failures                                            ║
╠════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣
║  1 failure(s) need to be resolved before agentic workflows can run.      ║
╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

[1] FAIL: runner-temp-unset
  [agentic-workflows.md §6] RUNNER_TEMP is not set; gh-aw requires it to be set to a path other than /tmp

  To fix:
    Set RUNNER_TEMP in the runner's .env file:

      echo "RUNNER_TEMP=$HOME/.gh-sr/runners/_temp" >> ~/actions-runner/.env
      mkdir -p "$HOME/.gh-sr/runners/_temp"
